app.title: Instagram Unfollow Radar
app.subtitle: Automatically find and unfollow non-followers on Instagram

status.error: Scan failed — please reload Instagram and try again

alerts.batchCompleteDesc: 50 users unfollowed. Do you want to continue?
alerts.rateLimitDesc: Instagram has rate-limited you. Please wait.
alerts.dailyLimitDesc: You have reached your daily unfollow limit. Please wait 24 hours for a new session.

filters.keywordsDesc: Users whose name or username contains these keywords will be skipped
filters.whitelistDesc: These users will never be unfollowed

watch.title: Watch list
watch.disclaimer: Use only in line with Instagram's rules and your own account. Private accounts you do not follow usually cannot be scanned.
watch.partialNote: Large follow lists are scanned in chunks (rate limits); refresh multiple times for fuller coverage.
watch.noNewFollows: No new follows detected in the last 24 hours
watch.addedOk: User added. Use Refresh to detect follow changes.
watch.errorNoInstagramTab: No instagram.com tab open or extension not loaded — open Instagram and reload the page.
watch.errorContentScript: Request failed. Reload instagram.com and try again.

error.max_entries: You can add up to 20 users
error.duplicate: This user is already on the list
error.not_found: User not found or profile unavailable
error.profile_failed: Could not load profile (account may be private)
error.not_in_list: User is not on the list
error.rate_limit: Instagram rate limit — try again later

warning.title: Warning:
warning.item1: Must be logged in at instagram.com
warning.item3: Pauses after first 50 users for confirmation
warning.item4: Free: 50 — Premium: 500 users per day limit

messages.confirmReset: All statistics will be reset. Are you sure?
messages.confirmReload: Extension not loaded yet. Would you like to reload the page?
messages.undoFailedDetail: Undo failed. Make sure you are logged in at instagram.com.
messages.startFailed: Failed to start — reload the page

premium.confirmDeactivate: Remove your Premium license? You will revert to the free plan (50/day).
premium.exportLockHint: 🔒 CSV export is a Premium feature — Upgrade to unlock
premium.buyHint: After purchase, enter the license key from your confirmation email below
premium.manageSubscriptionHint: on Gumroad to cancel your monthly billing.
premium.successMessage: Premium activated! You can now unfollow up to 500 users per day.
premium.errorInvalid: Invalid license key. Please double-check and try again.
premium.errorNetwork: Verification failed — please check your internet connection.

aria.chartDescription: Chart showing the number of users unfollowed in the last 30 days
